title: Microsoft negotiates the closure of several Xbox studios, including Double Fine, Ninja Theory and Compulsion
summary: Reports indicate that Microsoft seeks to close or sell studios, which has generated criticism and reactions in the industry.

title: Hellraiser: Revival will launch in October with an action-packed trailer
summary: The new horror game based on the film will debut in October, offering bloody combat and hellish powers.

title: Nintendo updates Switch eShop to make it faster after nearly a decade
summary: A new system update resolves the slowness problem in the Nintendo Switch digital store.

title: Overwatch 2 season 3 introduces hero Shion and the Tokyo map
summary: The update includes a new hero, balance improvements, and the Tokyo map after the dominance of the Apache Helicopter meta.

title: Steam Next Fest attracts with hundreds of demos and debate on generative AI
summary: The Steam demo event gathers more than a thousand games with generative AI reveals and recommendations.

title: Don't Nod, developer of Life is Strange, needs urgent funding to avoid closure
summary: The company reports that it could run out of cash in November if it does not secure investment.

title: Xbox Game Pass announces new games for June and July, including EA Sports FC 26
summary: The subscription service adds titles like EA Sports FC 26 and others, while departures are prepared.

title: Take-Two confirms GTA 6 release date and explains its delay
summary: The CEO of Take-Two reiterates the Grand Theft Auto 6 timeline, generating expectations.

title: Guides for projects and events in Arc Raiders
summary: Solutions are published to complete projects and events in the extraction game Arc Raiders.

title: Outward 2 delays its early access until 2027
summary: The survival RPG postpones its release to 2027, shortly before the scheduled date.

title: Hackers steal Nintendo employee data and demand $2 million
summary: A cyberattack on Nintendo exposes employee information, with a ransom of two million dollars.

title: Sony patents a controller with buttons that stiffen during gameplay
summary: A new Sony patent describes a controller with variable stiffness buttons to improve control.

title: Mark Hamill joins the Twisted Metal series in an iconic role
summary: The Star Wars actor joins the cast of the post-apocalyptic car combat series.

title: Pokémon Champions announces release date and tips for using Mega Raichu
summary: The Pokémon battle game will come to mobile and consoles, and recommendations about Raichu are offered.

title: Minecraft's Chaos Cubed update introduces sulfur cubes and more
summary: New content in Minecraft with sulfur cubes and other items, along with detailed guides.

title: United Kingdom plans to ban social media for under 16s
summary: The British government proposes blocking social platforms for minors, generating uncertainty in the video game industry.

title: Sega creates a Sonic figure with his DNA in a Chaos Emerald
summary: The Japanese company presents a life-sized figure containing the blue hedgehog's DNA, sparking reactions.

title: Studio closes after launching successful cosmic horror game on Game Pass
summary: Shortly after releasing a game on Xbox Game Pass, the studio behind it lays off all its staff.

title: Final Fantasy VII Revelation reveals secrets of its subtitle and game mechanics
summary: Director Naoki Hamaguchi explains the meaning of the subtitle and new details are shown.

title: Embark intensifies the fight against cheaters in Arc Raiders
summary: The studio announces measures to eliminate cheaters and ban free equipment in Arc Raiders.
